task: Parse an AWS CloudFormation template and extract all resource logical IDs that are of type 'AWS::S3::Bucket'
solution_criteria: Function should return a list of logical IDs for all S3 bucket resources. Should handle both JSON and YAML-formatted templates (as JSON). Should correctly identify only resources with Type equal to 'AWS::S3::Bucket'.

task: Create a JSON IAM policy that allows a principal to perform read-only operations on a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket' and all objects within it
solution_criteria: Valid JSON IAM policy with correct structure. Must include s3:GetObject and s3:ListBucket actions. Must restrict resources to the specified bucket ARN and its contents. Must use 'Allow' effect.

task: Create a regular expression that matches valid AWS IAM role ARNs
solution_criteria: Regex should match ARNs in format 'arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT_ID:role/ROLE_NAME'. Should validate numeric account ID (12 digits) and alphanumeric role names with hyphens and underscores. Should not match invalid formats or other AWS resource types.
